commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a cooperative scheduler to Ollama native stream parsing, classifies signal-aborted stream failures as aborted, and adds dense-stream and abort regression tests.

PR surface: Source +47, Tests +86. Total +133 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was established in this review. Current main source shows dense NDJSON parsing can drain bursts without macrotask yields, and the PR adds a focused dense-stream test, but the linked Windows Gateway starvation scenario was not rerun.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainer-authored, maintainer-labeled provider hot-path PR needs human landing judgment; there is no narrow automated repair target from this review.

target.title: fix(ollama): yield during dense stream processing
target.body:
## Summary

- yield cooperatively while draining dense Ollama NDJSON stream bursts
- map caller aborts during stream parsing to `aborted` instead of generic `error`
- add coverage for dense burst yielding and abort classification

Relates to https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/86599.

## Verification

Behavior addressed: Dense Ollama stream chunks can no longer monopolize the Gateway event loop for a whole burst before yielding.

Real environment tested: focused local Vitest wrapper, formatting/lint checks, branch autoreview, and AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate from this patch series.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```sh
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/ollama/src/stream.test.ts --reporter=dot
node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/ollama/src/stream.ts extensions/ollama/src/stream.test.ts
node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs extensions/ollama/src/stream.ts extensions/ollama/src/stream.test.ts
.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main
node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --target linux --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 180m --timing-json --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"
```

Evidence after fix: final refreshed head `41508c27bd9b`; focused `extensions/ollama/src/stream.test.ts` passed with 12/12 tests after rebasing onto current `origin/main`; oxfmt and oxlint passed on the touched files; branch autoreview previously reported no accepted/actionable findings. AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` previously passed for this patch with provider `aws`, lease `cbx_64545702c600`, slug `blue-barnacle`, run `run_4d4493d6b83c`, machine `c7a.8xlarge`, exit `0`, `leaseStopped=true`.

Observed result after fix: Dense parsed Ollama records are processed with cooperative yields and aborts preserve the model-call abort category.

What was not tested: Live Windows Ollama reproduction from https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/86599 was not rerun in this focused provider-stream PR.
target.author: vincentkoc
